templates.description: Top N customers by total revenue in a period.

sql.postgres: SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE created_at >= %(start)s AND created_at < %(end)s GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT %(limit)s
sql.cloudsql: SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE created_at >= %(start)s AND created_at < %(end)s GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT %(limit)s

templates.description: Daily revenue total over a period.

sql.postgres: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at)::date AS day, SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE created_at >= %(start)s AND created_at < %(end)s GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
sql.cloudsql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at)::date AS day, SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE created_at >= %(start)s AND created_at < %(end)s GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

templates.description: Count of distinct active users in a period.

sql.postgres: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_users FROM events WHERE created_at >= %(start)s AND created_at < %(end)s
sql.cloudsql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_users FROM events WHERE created_at >= %(start)s AND created_at < %(end)s
